rationale: Review 2's approve produces the better PR: no reuse issues (duplication or misuse of HopfAlgebra/GroupLike/IsGeometricallyReduced/etc.) exist in the diff, and AlgPoints is a fresh, unused helper with k-points semantics that needs no generalization. Review 1's sole finding is ungrounded in the diff (external roadmap claim), so acting on it forces a needless rename/complexity that leaves the merged result strictly worse.
